zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Swynford於1367年2月24日出生在英國林可爾史爾林肯時，他的父親Sir Hugh Swynford27歲，母親Katherine de Roet16歲。他於1386年與Joan Crophill在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1432年4月2日在英國林可爾史爾凱特列索普享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Swynford于1367年2月24日出生在英国林可爾史爾林肯时，他的父亲Sir Hugh Swynford27岁，母亲Katherine de Roet16岁。他于1386年与Joan Crophill在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1432年4月2日在英国林可爾史爾凱特列索普享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Swynford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Gloucestershire, Oxfordshire, Kent): habitational name from Old Swinford (Worcestershire), Kingswinford (Staffordshire), Swinford (Leicestershire), Swinford in Cumnor (Berkshire), or Swinford in Hothfield (Kent), all of which are recorded Swineford or Swyneford in medieval documents. The placenames derive from Old English swīn ‘swine, pig’ + ford ‘ford’.

variants.name: Swineford
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from one of the English places that gave rise to   Swinford  .
Americanized form of German Schweinfurt(h), a habitational name from a place so named (Franconia).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Swynford was born on 24 February 1367, in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Sir Hugh Swynford, was 27 and his mother, Katherine de Roet, was 16. He married Joan Crophill in 1386, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 2 April 1432, in Kettlethorpe, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Swynford est né le 24 février 1367, à Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Hugh Swynford, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Katherine de Roet, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Joan Crophill en 1386, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 2 avril 1432, à Kettlethorpe, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Swynford am 24. Februar 1367 in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Hugh Swynford 27 und seine Mutter Katherine de Roet 16. Er hat 1386 in England Joan Crophill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 2. April 1432 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Kettlethorpe, Lincolnshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Swynford è nato il il 24 febbraio 1367 nel Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Hugh Swynford, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Katherine de Roet, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Joan Crophill nel 1386, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 2 aprile 1432, nel Kettlethorpe, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Swynfordが1367年2月24日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアリンコルンで生まれた時，父Sir Hugh Swynfordは27歳，母Katherine de Roetは16歳であった。1386年にイギリスでJoan Crophillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1432年4月2日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアケットレソルペで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Swynford(이)가 1367년 2월 24일 영국 링코실르 링코컨에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Hugh Swynford(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine de Roet(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1386년 영국에서 Joan Crophill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1432년 4월 2일 영국 링코실르 케틀레소에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.24 February 1367–2 April 1432: 24 de fevereiro de 1367–2 de abril de 1432
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Swynford nasceu em 24 de fevereiro de 1367, em Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Hugh Swynford, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Katherine de Roet, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Crophill em 1386, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 2 de abril de 1432, em Kettlethorpe, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Swynford родился 24 февраля 1367 г. в местности линколн, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Hugh Swynford было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine de Roet, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Crophill в 1386 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 2 апреля 1432 г. в местности кеттлетаурп, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 65 лет.

es.24 February 1367–2 April 1432: 24 de febrero de 1367–2 de abril de 1432
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Swynford nació el 24 de febrero de 1367, en Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Hugh Swynford, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Katherine de Roet, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Joan Crophill en 1386, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 2 de abril de 1432, en Kettlethorpe, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 65 años.
